title: russelia coccinea f. polyedra
intro: Russelia coccinea f. polyedra, also known as Firecracker Plant, is a flowering perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant contains medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Russelia coccinea f. polyedra include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
